jobs.name: Street Cleaner
jobs.description: Keeping the Slums clean. Honest work, but the locals barely notice.

jobs.name: Delivery Driver
jobs.description: Moving goods across Industrial district. The pay is decent if you don't crash.

jobs.name: Security Guard
jobs.description: Watching warehouses at night. Boring but steady.

jobs.name: Cashier
jobs.description: Working retail in Downtown. Ms. Chen owns half the stores here.

jobs.name: Warehouse Worker
jobs.description: Lifting boxes and loading trucks. Marco respects hard work.

jobs.name: Office Clerk
jobs.description: Paperwork and coffee runs. The first step up from the streets.

jobs.name: Bartender
jobs.description: Serving drinks on The Strip. Lou watches everyone who works here.

jobs.name: Junior Developer
jobs.description: Writing code for downtown startups. Pays well but demanding.

jobs.name: Floor Trader
jobs.description: Buying and selling on the exchange floor. The Broker is always watching.

jobs.name: Financial Analyst
jobs.description: Crunching numbers for hedge funds. Cold. Precise. Profitable.

jobs.name: District Manager
jobs.description: Running operations across Downtown. The city notices you now.
